jobs.title: Senior DevOps Engineer
jobs.description: Are you a talented Senior DevOps looking for a remote job that lets you show your skills and get decent compensation? Look no further than Lemon.io — the marketplace that connects you with hand-picked startups in the US and Europe.
match_reasons: Strong alignment with tech stack including AWS, GCP, Java, JavaScript, Node.js, Kubernetes, Python.
Role is fully remote with no location restriction, allowing for work from Nigeria.
Senior level position matches candidate's experience as a Senior Software Engineer.

jobs.title: Senior AI Engineer
jobs.description: Are you a talented Senior AI Engineer looking for a remote job that lets you show your skills and get decent compensation? Look no further than Lemon.io — the marketplace that connects you with hand-picked startups in the US and Europe.
match_reasons: Technology stack includes Java, JavaScript, Node.js, Python, React, matching candidate's skills.
Senior level role fits candidate's current position and experience level.
Job role is remote but with preferred regions, offering potential accessibility despite geographic location.

jobs.title: Senior Full-stack Engineer (Python/React) - Advertising
jobs.description: At Truelogic we are a leading provider of nearshore staff augmentation services headquartered in New York. For over two decades, we’ve been delivering top-tier technology solutions to companies of all sizes, from innovative startups to industry leaders, helping them achieve their digital transformation goals.
match_reasons: Proficiency in Python and React directly applicable to the role.
Senior level position aligns with candidate’s experience and skills.
Remote work options align with candidate’s preference, although LATAM preference might be restrictive.

jobs.title: Java Backend Engineer (AI/LLM Chatbot, Customer Service)
jobs.description: Binance is the leading global blockchain ecosystem and cryptocurrency infrastructure provider whose suite of financial products includes the world’s largest digital-asset exchange.Our mission is to accelerate cryptocurrency adoption and increase the freedom of money. If you’re looking for a fast-paced, mission-driven organization where opportunities to learn and excel are endless, then Binance is the place for you.
match_reasons: Strong expertise in Java and back-end engineering aligns with role requirement.
Role is focused on AI/LLM chatbot which is an emerging interest aligning with the candidate's recent achievements.
The role's location preference might limit accessibility since it requires APAC timezone presence.
